protocol.name: Omicron Object Model Distributed Protocol
protocol.summary: Decentralized multi-modal browser protocol joining DOM, CSSOM, JSDOM, graphics memory, WordNet routing, and OMI token prefixes into one addressable route fabric.

sources.role: Tetragrammatron developer documentation — 12-face triakis tetrahedron face guide (11 protocol + CLA + GC)
sources.sourceNotes: Developer documentation suite organizing the entire OMI protocol into 12-face triakis tetrahedron (11 SPO-named protocol layers + CLA substrate + _temp GC inbox). Each face README covers what/how/extend for beginner through expert developers.

sources.role: JSON Canvas v1.0 layout of the 4-bit carry lookahead adder — 3 nodes (Step 0/Step 1/Outputs) + 2 edges
sources.sourceNotes: Visual substrate for the Tetragrammatron Explorer. Nodes use integer color presets 2 (amber), 3 (yellow), 5 (cyan). Edges use preset 4 (green) and 5 (cyan).

sources.role: Tetragrammatron Explorer canvas — interactive 4-bit CLA simulation and live gate delay viewer
sources.sourceNotes: Standalone browser UI for exploring the carry lookahead adder substrate. Renders JSON Canvas nodes via dataset attributes and runs real-time 4-bit CLA on user-supplied inputs.

sources.role: bijective two-cube state transition kernel — N-1 non-redundant federated replication
sources.sourceNotes: Implements Rule 0x8F-0x91. Allocates ArrayBuffer(128*8) transition workspace per HNSW buffer node. Reversible state mapping via BigInt64Array over 128-bit state space. Active/inverse face pairs sum to 127.
Defines the algebraic lexer that treats instruction validation as surface membership: Q(S) = E_var + E_const = 0.

addressSpaces.meaning: Content/process delivery range for OMI semantic subsystems, including peripheral hardware buses.
Browser-local context boundary for DOM, CSSOM, JSDOM, SVG, A-Frame, and JSON Canvas projections.
Remote or deferred codepoint hierarchy marker.
Documentation-safe IPv6 centroid projection for WordNet and DOM/CSSOM reference terms.

tokenLayouts.meaning: Canonical browser-local OMI address with bounded RS control and US unit/codepoint fields.
Fano WordNet synset route with operator-first relation routing and 16-byte packet serialization.
Prospectus grammar extension for a two-cube Universal POS and Universal Features routing table.
*.omi binary-to-text file frame with 4-byte pre-header and dot-delimited lambda-cube body.

cdr.payload: URL-safe Base64 typed vector or UTF-8 clamped fallback

objectSurfaces.role: transactional text token and BiDi bridge surface

objectSurfaces.name: WordNet/Prolog
objectSurfaces.role: synset relation and semantic centroid surface

lifecycle.name: promote-gc-sweep
lifecycle.meaning: 6! boundary for pruning volatile leaf state

lifecycle.name: hard-reset
lifecycle.meaning: 7! boundary for clearing active memory registers

hardwareEngines.role: multi-user timing collision detection over Fano lines
approximate nearest-neighbor lookup over text and geometry
Reed-Solomon GF(2^8) encode/decode for fragment storage
version vector causal ordering and merge for distributed state
push-pull gossip exchange with frontier-based delta computation
periodic divergence detection and fragment repair scheduler
GPU Horner evaluation for polyform extrusion
headless DOM/CSSOM mirror without runtime dependency
Web Serial API virtual COM port buffer routed through ::10
WebUSB raw endpoint access routed through ::11
WebHID structured report bus routed through ::12
distributed causal closure with frontier-based merge and causally consistent event ordering
WebGL 2.0 polytope rendering with Fano-plane vertex projections and 4D/3D barycentric indexing

Δ_C period-8 orbit engine with Fano plane incidence matrix: deltaC(), fanoIntercept(), verifyOrbitLexer(). Proves frame admissibility via Q(N,M) = 0 and ray resolution within the Fano lottery bound of ≤15 steps.

controlDescriptors.role: RS control predicates and F-expression declarations
US unit/codepoint definitions and S-expression leaves

transformers.role: extract route, header, service bus, or context
extract payload, tail tokens, binary vector, or deferred body
parse and normalize canonical FS/GS/RS/US address
semantic centroid and local route projection
byte-level endian, packet, and timeline interpretation
first-order Boolean logic kernel with OMI-CIDR address slot predicates
preprocessor that expands ?-prefixed trigraph tokens into canonical OMI operator forms
sexagesimal and mixed-base place-value expression evaluator
axiomatic proof kernel for OMI invariant verification using Peano-style axioms
3D polytope coordinate projection from 24-cell / 5-cell / tetrahedron modifiers using Horner evaluation
deterministic pseudo-random draw from a chiral-urn distribution over OMI-CIDR stride slots
bounded FIFO ring buffer with chiral read/write heads and stride-aligned tick advancement

transformers.signature: verifyOrbitLexer(S), fanoIntercept(a, b, c), deltaC(x, c)
transformers.role: Δ_C-orbit lexer: validates 128-bit instruction words lie on a valid period-8 Δ_C trajectory with consistent Fano point LL. The binary quadratic form Q(N,M) = K(LL) = 0 proves frame admissibility. The Fano plane guarantees any two distinct rays resolve within ≤15 steps.

routingTables.role: Universal POS to OMI port channel projection

entries.role: base entities, actions, global script blocks, and process boundaries
loop counts, bitwidth shifts, carry signals, and coordinate scalars
0x00..0x3f controls and lazy Prolog F-expression declarations
0x00..0x7f codepoints, eager S-expression leaves, and terminal polynomial payloads

routingTables.role: context qualifiers for grammatical and synset routes

polynomial.glsl: ((aCoefficients.x * uTimeStep + aCoefficients.y) * uTimeStep + aCoefficients.z) * uTimeStep + aCoefficients.w

lifecycleSweeps.action: flag dead slots or zero-weight polynomial trajectories with .omi-evicted and remove after a transition
clear master pointer, zero volatile shared-memory slots, and reset canvas transforms to origin

complianceChecks.requirement: Generated DOM ids and data-omi attributes use flat hyphen-delimited tokens; raw non-printing controls are represented by printable descriptors.
Subtree updates and filtering use id or data-omi prefix containment.
Volatile memory and route updates respect 720 promote and 5040 hard-reset lifecycle boundaries.
OMI text transactions resolve through native hyphen and dot token splitting in the hot path.
Transport and graphics handoff use ArrayBuffer, SharedArrayBuffer, typed arrays, or DataView blocks instead of JSON string objects.
Generated browser-local addresses normalize to omi-ffff-127-0-0-1.
Semantic content routes identify ::1..::12; WordNet uses ::3; TURN proxy uses ::4; HNSW indexer uses ::5; WebSerial uses ::10; WebUSB uses ::11; WebHID uses ::12.

terms.definition: Hyphen-delimited object identity and route token namespace.
Containment and stability model for address prefix projection.
IP routing / route-table semantics over OMI token prefixes.
Runtime browser object tree and address host.
Native selector and rule surface for OMI prefix routing.
Server/test mirror of DOM/CSSOM semantics, documented without adding a dependency.
Byte-level memory interpretation layer for OMI buffers and packets.
